title: The politics of the UK personal-tax game board
ethicalLine: Politics explains incentives; it does not excuse evasion. Use the map to comply better and plan lawfully.

themes.label: Fiscal drag
themes.plain: Freezing allowances and thresholds can raise tax without raising headline rates: inflation/wage growth pulls more people into tax or higher bands.
themes.cantonese: 唔加 tax rate 都可以收多啲：freeze thresholds，人工/通脹一升，你就被拖入更高 band。
themes.whyItMatters: It is politically quieter than saying 'we raised Income Tax', but it changes who pays and how much.

themes.label: Cliff edges and tapers
themes.plain: The system is full of thresholds: £60k/£80k Child Benefit charge, £100k Personal Allowance taper, pension taper and allowance traps.
themes.cantonese: 英國税唔係平滑斜路，係好多陷阱位：£60k/£80k child benefit、£100k allowance taper、pension taper。
themes.whyItMatters: People with advisers can plan around thresholds; people without advice often only notice after payroll or Self Assessment bites.

themes.label: Choice inequality
themes.plain: Tax planning often comes from choice: when to realise gains, whether to use a wrapper, how to structure work, and whether income can be deferred or sacrificed.
themes.cantonese: 真正 game 位係 choice：幾時賣、放唔放 ISA/pension、點樣收 remuneration、可唔可以 salary sacrifice。
themes.whyItMatters: The more control someone has over timing and form, the more legal planning tools they can use.
